title: ferray-random: size=0 returns error instead of empty array
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Every distribution method in ferray-random returns an error when size is 0: 'size must be > 0'. NumPy returns a zero-length array for size=0, which is useful for conditional generation (generate n samples where n might be 0). This is a minor divergence but can cause issues when porting NumPy code.
